title: Plastic Safety Scraper Car Sticker Remover Glass Scraper Ceramic Hob Scraper with 10 Pcs Double Edge Plastic Scraping Replacement for Removing Decals from Glass Windshields Ceramic Hob
features: High quality plastic Material, Light weight, durable and good cleaning performance.
Double scraping egde, economical and lasting using. Replace the replacement quickly.
Safely to the surface, avoiding scratches leave.
Perfect for removing stickers, decals, stovetops,food, sealant, silicone, paint, food and more.
Small Scraper: 10cm(L) x 4cm(W), Easy to use, carry and store.
description: Widely used in: kitchen, bathroom, outdoor cleaning, workshop, office, car, boat, motorcycle, home decoration. This scraper will remove decals/stickers/paints when you install vinyl film or window tint film. This scraper will remove adhesive labels for glass cups, dishes; remove the putty for stovetop. Key Features: EFFECTIVE SCRAPER EDGE - Same cleaning way as metal scraper, plastic beveled edge fits into the bottom of glues/paints for removal. Safe Plastic Edge The edge of the scraper is safe for your hands, avoiding any injury. In addition, this scraper tool can be used on delicate surfaces like glass, paper and leather. Comfortable Curved Grip The shape of the handle fits your hands, allowing you to spend less effort to finish cleaning jobs. QUICK REPLACEMENT OF SCRAPER - Simply remove the old replacement scraper to replace another one without any additional tools. Size: 10 x 4 cm. Package includes: 1 x Scraper 10 x Replacement Plastic Scraper
